name: Controllable Jump
description: Adds variable jump height. Hold the jump key to jump higher, tap for a short hop. Release the jump key mid-air to cut upward velocity.
author: Parkoreen

cutStrength.label: Cut Strength
cutStrength.description: How much upward velocity is preserved when jump is released (0.0 = instant stop, 1.0 = no cut). Lower = more control.
